title: TaskInputOutputContext
description: The TaskInputOutputContext class is a context object that allows input and output from the task. It is only supplied to the Mapper or Reducer. The class provides methods for advancing to the next key-value pair, getting the current key and value, and generating output key-value pairs. The class takes a Configuration object, a TaskAttemptID object, a RecordWriter object for output, an OutputCommitter object, and a StatusReporter object as input. It depends on the Configuration, TaskAttemptID, RecordWriter, OutputCommitter, and StatusReporter classes.
